error_signature: No configuration file provided: not found
title: Docker Compose configuration file not found
symptom: When trying to start n8n with Docker Compose, the command returns 'No configuration file provided: not found'. This indicates that Docker cannot find the required docker-compose.yml file.
applies_when: Using Docker Compose to run n8n
The docker-compose.yml file is not in the current directory
not_this_if: The docker-compose.yml file is present in the current directory
root_cause: Docker Compose requires a configuration file named docker-compose.yml to define the services and settings for the containers. If this file is not found in the current working directory, Docker Compose cannot start the services.
fix_steps: Navigate to the directory where the docker-compose.yml file is located
Run the command 'docker compose up -d' to start the services
agent_instruction: Ensure you are in the correct directory with the docker-compose.yml file and run 'docker compose up -d'.
